texto: Eena had thought the whole idea of his picture was absolutely wonderful and had asked Willum what kind of animal she might be. He’d responded after only a moment of thought.
explicacao: Citação de “I think you’d be a crioness.” sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Eena had thought the whole idea of his picture was absolutely wonderful and had asked Willum what…” articula reflexao, why-is-that, thought em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
